must_pass.title: Inventory fidelity (133/29 verbatim)
must_pass.evidence: docs/migration/tool-inventory.json totals = {tools:133, writes:29, readonly:104}; validator T2 green; source HEAD 0727116cc821 reproduces same.

must_pass.title: Total domain coverage (set equality, disjoint per server)
must_pass.evidence: validator T3 (set-equality) and T4 (pairwise disjoint) both pass; per-server {platform:51, media:30, network:7, homeauto:16, control:29} = 133.

must_pass.title: Write-tool isolation
must_pass.evidence: validator T5 + T7: every WRITE_TOOLS member is on homelab-mcp-control; no readonly server has any of the 29 write tools.

must_pass.title: Phased rollout with explicit gates
must_pass.evidence: design.md §7 declares Phases 0..5 with G1..G5 per server; §7.1 makes Phase 5 entry-criterion script-asserted via phase-status.json.

must_pass.title: Compatibility monolith retained
must_pass.evidence: design.md §1 fallback diagram, §7 phases keep monolith running through Phases 0–4; cutover checklist per server in §7 + §7.2.

must_pass.title: Adversarial review clean (no critical, highs mitigated)
must_pass.evidence: as-findings.json: 0 critical, 4 high all mitigated in spec/design (AS-1→Q4, AS-2→G4 request-shape parity, AS-3→phase-status.json, AS-4→Phase 4 rotation policy).

must_pass.title: No source-repo writes
must_pass.evidence: git status in C:\src\homelab is clean except pre-existing untracked out/Rivet/* directories present before this SDD started; no file was modified in the source repo by this workflow.

must_pass.title: Public migration-plan.md present
must_pass.evidence: docs/migration/migration-plan.md created on feat/migration-plan; mirrors design §2.1 split table.

must_pass.title: rivet verify --scope branch exits 0
must_pass.evidence: Run at Step 9; this grade artifact is finalised after Step 9 verification.

must_fail.title: Sum != 133, duplicates, or unknown tools
must_fail.evidence: validator T2/T3/T4 reject these; design.md §12 T8/T10/T11 enumerate the rejections.

must_fail.title: Write tool on readonly server
must_fail.evidence: validator T5/T7 reject; design.md §12 T9/T12 enumerate.

must_fail.title: Delete monolith before any split passes
must_fail.evidence: design.md §7.1 Phase-5 entry-criterion script asserts len(phases)==5 and all gates green AND OpenWebUI grep returns zero matches; impossible to satisfy before any split passes.

must_fail.title: Big-bang cutover
must_fail.evidence: design.md §7 explicitly phased; spec.md R5 retains monolith; nothing in plan proposes a single switch.

must_fail.title: Control without isolation
must_fail.evidence: design.md §5 control-server row mandates separate Service, second label gate, bearer token; §6 G5 requires NetworkPolicy isolation gate.

must_fail.title: Unresolved critical adversarial findings
must_fail.evidence: as-findings.json summary: critical=0; verdict="PROCEED with edits".

must_fail.title: Missing SDD artifacts
must_fail.evidence: All required artifacts exist except verify-result.json + f10-compliance.md (created at Steps 9/10 by CLI).

must_fail.title: PR modifies source repo
must_fail.evidence: git -C C:\src\homelab status -s shows only pre-existing untracked out/Rivet/* directories (none from this SDD).

must_fail.title: Unannotated 'verified working' claims
must_fail.evidence: Phase 0 ships no per-tool verification; docs/migration/verification/ is reserved for phase SDDs and is not populated here.

rationale: 8/9 MUST PASS criteria are green at Step 8. MP-9 (rivet verify --scope branch) is intentionally graded at Step 9; this artifact will be re-read by the verify gate.
